sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking (41,49)
seg = current_frame.segmentation

# Find 20px objects
print("20px objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 20:
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  {n['color']} 20px at ({cr},{cc})")

# Find 12px objects
print("\n12px objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 12:
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  {n['color']} 12px at ({cr},{cc})")

# Check w segments
print("\nw segments:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'w':
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  w {n['pixels']}px at ({cr},{cc})")

# Check for new objects
print("\nAll non-background objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] < 100:
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  {n['color']} {n['pixels']}px at ({cr},{cc})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
